description: USB port to DDR player mapping for RootDDR

p1.description: Player 1 USB port assignment (USB 2 and USB 3)

p2.description: Player 2 USB port assignment (USB 2 and USB 3)

notes: To detect the correct bus numbers run: lsusb -t (Linux host) or check /sys/bus/usb/devices/
Each entry under usb2_bus or usb3_bus is a comma-separated list of bus IDs that map to that player
The mapper will try usb3 first then usb2 for each player unless a specific mask is forced
Edit this file with actual bus IDs matching your cabinet's physical wiring
